Noted the narrative transition between 'Way 2 U' and 'Villain' (03:45-04:23). 3. Resolved metadata for each: 'Phony' by Tsumiki, 'Way 2 U' by Ouro Kronii, 'Villain' by Teniwoha. 4. Mapped scenes and created the JSON object with the gathered data, ensuring all strings are escaped correctly.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring three songs performed by Ouro Kronii: 'Phony' (originally by Tsumiki), 'Way 2 U' (original song by Ouro Kronii), and 'Villain' (originally by Teniwoha), connected by a narrative segment.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In this world, there is no flower more beautiful than an artificial one.
Because everything is made of lies, an antipathy world.
The rain of despair stabs at my umbrella,
wetting my bangs and the back of my heart.
It's annoying.
Before I knew it, the leaves of words had withered away,
and the fruit of fact is ripening within me.
Reflected in the mirror, I draw lies and lose sight of myself, a makeup.
Pa-pa-pa, la-pa-pa, la-la-pa-pa-pa.
Let's count riddles and play.
Ta-ta-ta-la, ta-ta-la, la-ta-ta.
Why, why, I wonder why I'm dancing here?
I don't even know simple things. What was I again?
Even that is tied up by the hands of the night and disappears like love.
Phony, Phony, Phony.
I, tangled in lies, am a Phony.
(Antipathy world)
Before I knew it, the sound of the sky became unpleasant to hear,
and the color of my eyes is melting you.
Missing the me reflected in the mirror,
a fake that everyone misunderstood.
Why do people flock to things like love and live desiring them?
Today too, the night train I'm swimming in passes by.
Dance until dawn.
Pa-pa-pa, la-pa-pa, la-la-pa-pa-pa.
Let's deceive each other and sing riddles.
Ta-ta-ta-la, ta-ta-la, la-ta-ta.
Why, why, I wonder why it hurts here?
This miserable life won't change.
The rain of despair won't stop.
Saying goodbye without even being able to say it, Phony.
Just tangled in lies.
I don't even know simple things. What was I again?
Even that is tied up by the hands of the night and disappears like love.
Phony, Phony, Phony.
I, tangled in lies, am a Phony.
A secret Phony that only artificial flowers know.
